key: listening18_phone_tips
text: Hi, this is a quick tip from your phone. To take a great photo, hold the phone with two hands and keep it still. Tap the screen to focus on the people. Try to put the famous view in the background. If you want everyone in the picture, take a selfie, but stand a little closer together. And remember, ask people to smile before you take the photo. Now you are ready. Enjoy your day and take wonderful photos.

key: listening18_tour_mate
text: Hey there. I saw you taking photos alone. Would you like me to take one of you? I am happy to help. Just stand in front of the landmark, and I will get the whole view in the background. Do you want a close one or a wide one? Okay, take a step closer to your friend and smile. Perfect. I took three photos, so you can choose your favorite. Have a great trip, and enjoy the sightseeing.

key: Excuse me! Could you take a photo of me, please?

key: [order-l18]
text: Elaine sees a beautiful landmark. She walks up to a stranger. She says excuse me and asks for a photo. She stands with the view in the background and smiles. She says thank you for the help.
